message:
style(tests/lifecycle_matrix): collapse three JSON parse bindings onto one line

rustfmt-aligned single-line equivalents of three
  serde_json::from_str(&String::from_utf8(out.stdout).expect("utf8"))
      .expect("valid JSON");
expressions across the models verify/status and check-update
identity tests. Same behavior, less wrapping; matches the
surrounding one-line style in this file.

Pure formatting — no test semantics change, no invariants altered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
